title: hieracium stelligerum subsp. albulum
intro: Hieracium stelligerum subsp. albulum, also known as Hieracium albulum, is a subspecies of the Hawkweed genus, characterized by its dandelion-like appearance and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium albulum may include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Hieracium albulum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and address various health concerns.
